title: Add git safety guardrails for colocated JJ repos
description: Allow normal git fetch/push flows but warn or block dangerous history-editing commands in colocated jj repositories.

title: Add minimal static JJ guidance to prompts
description: Keep a short, stable prompt snippet that tells the agent to prefer jj in jj repos and avoid dynamic context.

title: Add hook-based JJ detection and status updates
description: Replace dynamic prompt injection with hook-driven repo detection and status refresh for JJ repos.

title: Improve JJ statusline output
description: Enhance the statusline to clearly show JJ active state and dirty/clean status without unnecessary dynamic prompt content.
close_reason: Statusline now shows jj:clean/jj:dirty plus summary details

title: Document colocated JJ plus Git workflow
description: Document the intended workflow: use jj locally, allow git push/fetch, and keep the package lightweight and non-invasive.
close_reason: README now documents colocated jj+git workflow and static guidance
